steps.t: Hlídborg can be found in south east Câr Bronach. You should travel to Hlídborg.
Hlídborg can be found in south east Câr Bronach. You should find some evidence of Angmarim influence over the stone-giants.
Dourhand coffers can be found at Hlídborg. You should collect any Dourhand coffers that you find.
Órug can be found at Leitstáth. You should bring the Dourhand coffers to Órug.
Kúzun can be found at Leitstáth. You should talk to Kúzun.
